title: Uruguayan Prawn Wrap
description: A quick and flavorful Uruguayan-inspired wrap filled with succulent prawns, crispy onions, and fresh cilantro.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add diced onion and cook until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Add prawns and cook until pink and fully cooked, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Stir in crumbly cheese and cook until melted and smooth.
Warm tortilla by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing cooked prawn mixture onto the center of the tortilla, followed by a sprinkle of cilantro and a pinch of paprika.
Fold the bottom half of the tortilla up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a tight cylinder.
Optional: top with additional cilantro, cheese, or a dollop of your favorite sauce.
